Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'lining up stunning £50m move' for Spain star
arts.sum: Chelsea are allegedly ready to make a £50m move for Barcelona midfielder Gavi during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Shakhtar Donetsk to sign Leicester City target Alisson
arts.sum: Shakhtar Donetsk are set to sign Atletico Mineiro winger Alisson (19), according to a report from L’Équipe. The Brazilian was the subject of a failed approach from Leicester City during the January…

arts.ttl: Four bold ideas Ruud van Nistelrooy must try to turn Leicester season around
arts.sum: The contrast between the two halves in last Thursday’s defeat to West Ham offered a “big lesson” to the Leicester City players, Ruud van Nisterlooy suggested. Van Nistelrooy said he would use him when he’s better than what they have, but is he not already a better option than having two centre-backs on the bench?

arts.ttl: 'I will improve': Reece James gives thoughts on playing as midfielder for Chelsea after Enzo Maresca 'day one' comments
Former Chelsea player sold for less than £2m is shining right now, he's terrorising defenders in his league - opinion
Ruud van Nistelrooy knows where Leicester City problem lies over Jamie Vardy goal struggles
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy retains total faith in striker Jamie Vardy with the Leicester City captain to continue leading the line. “We have to make sure we keep creating chances for our attacking players,” van Nistelrooy said.
